title: syslog Logging driver support
body:
### Feature request description

I would like to request adding a syslog Logging driver, as Docker has.
It would allow using logs seamlessly on resources constrained environments which do not use journald, as OpenWrt.

Related:
#12537

comments.body: This sounds like a good idea. What do others think? @containers/podman-maintainers
We've been tracking this for a while, but in Jira not Github, so it's good to have a tracking issue for this. This is definitely on the roadmap now that we have Conmon v3.
Hi, Is this something I can pick up?
@hsaokar are you aware of whats going on with conmon v3 and podman's dependency of it ?

At a very high level, yes, but not in details (yet). 
My understanding is 1) the real change has to happen in conmon and then gets plumbed thru into  containers/common and podmon 2) conmon v3 is set to replace conmon, so it is desirable to add this support in v3 instead.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
